title: Continuous Latent Diffusion Language Model (Cola DLM)
summary: Hierarchical latent diffusion language model separating global semantic planning from local text generation, enabling scalable non-autoregressive language generation and future multimodal AI pathways.

title: MDASH: Multi-Agent AI Security Framework by Microsoft
summary: Enterprise-scale multi-agent cybersecurity framework orchestrating specialized AI agents for vulnerability discovery, exploit validation, and adaptive security remediation workflows.

title: Auto-Scientist by Adoption AI
summary: Autonomous AI research system automating experimentation, hypothesis testing, model training optimization, and iterative scientific workflows for accelerated AI development.

title: AAFLOW: Scalable Patterns for Agentic AI Workflows
summary: Scalable orchestration framework for coordinating complex enterprise-scale multi-agent AI workflows and intelligent agent collaboration systems.

title: Reinforced Agent: Inference-Time Feedback for Tool-Calling Agents
summary: Reinforcement-driven framework enabling AI agents to dynamically improve reasoning, tool usage, and adaptive decision-making during inference execution.

title: AI Co-Mathematician: Accelerating Mathematicians with Agentic AI
summary: Advanced collaborative reasoning system designed to support theorem discovery, mathematical exploration, and human-AI co-problem-solving workflows.

title: An Agentic Multi-Agent Architecture for Cybersecurity Risk Management
summary: Enterprise-grade multi-agent AI architecture for autonomous cybersecurity monitoring, orchestration, adaptive risk analysis, and intelligent security decision-making.

title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni — Open Multimodal Intelligence
summary: Compact multimodal foundation model integrating text, vision, and speech capabilities for efficient enterprise AI reasoning and agentic workloads.

title: Recursive Multi-Agent Systems (RecursiveMAS)
summary: Recursive multi-agent collaboration framework enabling iterative reasoning, scalable coordination, and deeper agentic problem-solving capabilities.
